rationale: F2 'Time vrstva' open 2026-06-13. F1 (ShowX-4) impl 11/11 accepted, automated gate green; F1 eyes-on batched into F2 gate (B005-010) per Jindřich 'otestujeme více věcí najednou'. Budget $30/phase; precise CLI-runner cost not metered in-repo.
